name: standardize_smiles
description: Canonicalize SMILES, generate InChIKeys, and deduplicate structures. Call this first when the user provides a SMILES string — other chemistry tools (check_toxicity, predict_admet, score_synthesizability, liquid_handler) expect canonical SMILES as input. After this, the natural next step is check_toxicity.

smiles_list.description: List of SMILES strings to standardize.

existing_inchikeys.description: Optional InChIKeys to treat as duplicates.
